failure_rules.detect: A node appears idle, unchanged, or empty after launch while Active Runs, recent launch history, or qa/run-ledger.md suggests the job may still be queued or processing.
failure_rules.action: Do not run the node again. Refresh or reopen the workflow, check Active Runs, inspect the node card after refresh, and wait through one more polling interval before deciding status.
failure_rules.cleanup: If status remains ambiguous after two refresh cycles, record blocked: node status unknown with node name/id and last observed UI state.

failure_rules.detect: The selected node has a matching queued/running Active Runs entry, spinner/progress state, or run-ledger launch without a finished asset id/URL.
failure_rules.action: Deselect it and wait. Do not click run. Refresh/reopen before any later status decision.
failure_rules.cleanup: Record the in-flight run in qa/run-ledger.md and continue only with independent nodes that are not waiting on it.

failure_rules.detect: Visible Imagine.Art node model label does not match intended model.
failure_rules.action: Stop before launch, correct the model in the UI or recreate the node manually, then re-check settings.
failure_rules.cleanup: Delete the incorrect node if it cannot be corrected cleanly.

failure_rules.detect: A campaign motion node visibly defaults to Kling 3.0 when the plan calls for Seedance 2 / Seedance 2.0.
failure_rules.action: Do not launch. Correct the visible model to Seedance 2 / Seedance 2.0 or recreate the node from the approved Seedance template.
failure_rules.cleanup: Delete the Kling-defaulted node if it cannot be corrected cleanly.

failure_rules.detect: Generation error says the selected ratio is not acceptable.
failure_rules.action: Retry once with the model automation default ratio from imagineart_model_matrix.json.
failure_rules.cleanup: Delete the failed node after recording the rejected ratio in QA.

failure_rules.detect: Output is a failure card, placeholder, empty image, or generic moderation warning.
failure_rules.action: Simplify the prompt, remove risky ambiguity, avoid brand-name shorthand, and retry once. If it fails again, switch model or redesign the shot.
failure_rules.cleanup: Do not connect the placeholder to downstream nodes. Delete it from the final workflow.

failure_rules.detect: Generated clip changes the product, wardrobe, face, key prop, or core composition.
failure_rules.action: Reduce motion complexity and regenerate from stronger start/end/reference frames.
failure_rules.cleanup: Remove the drifted motion branch from the final workflow.

failure_rules.detect: No generated music file exists for a campaign that requires final assembly.
failure_rules.action: Generate the Music Studio track or mark the deliverable as partial/proxy.
failure_rules.cleanup: Do not mark the final package as finished.

failure_rules.detect: Agent cannot access the logged-in Imagine.Art workflow UI.
failure_rules.action: Prepare the executable workflow package and list the blocker. Do not pretend execution happened.
failure_rules.cleanup: No live workflow cleanup is possible; document the state.
